sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71840" key="curr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξυρρ-</orth>, for words so beginning, <sense id="n71840.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">συρρ-</ref> </xr> ; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ξύν.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
